SOURCE: 10399912.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (10399912.pdf)
SUMMARY: 8 years as an Office Clerk, 2 years as a Student Intern/Office Assistant, and 4 years as a Contractor. Seeking Data Entry Clerk position.
SKILLS: Administrative Support, Auditing, File Management, Meeting Facilitation, Office Materials Management, Inventory Management, Microsoft Word, MS Excel, MS Outlook, MS PowerPoint, PeopleSoft, 40-60 WPM Typing, Clerical Support, Data Entry, Faxing, Incoming Mail, Legal Documents, Mail Clerk, Office Supplies, Stamping, Customer Service, Equipment Maintenance, Organizational Skills, Proofreading, Receptionist, Retail Sales, Scanning, Secretarial, Telephone Skills, 60 WPM Typing

SOURCE: 10399912.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Personnel Assistant
COMPANY: 
DATES: 03/2013 to 04/2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Supported HR staff with new hire orientations and monthly meetings.', 'Entered personnel data into a central database.', 'Reviewed HR paperwork for accuracy.', 'Drafted outgoing correspondence and reports.', 'Managed incoming and outgoing calls.', 'Maintained filing of HR action forms.', 'Assisted in conducting new hire pre-interviews.', 'Developed an internal new hire filing system.']

JOB TITLE: Assistant Store Clerk
COMPANY:

DESCRIPTION: ['Sold merchandise and provided customer service.', 'Monitored patrons for loss prevention.', 'Restocked shelves.', 'Maintained store appearance.']
